channel.title: Blogs on S. Chen's Academic Homepage
channel.description: Recent content in Blogs on S. Chen's Academic Homepage

item.title: I update my homepage with new template!
item.description: I update my homepage with hugo-resume theme. This template is quite clear and pretty. Thanks to the open-source of this theme. This template seems more appropriate for the developer’s self-introduction. I have deeply developed it to form a Academic Homepage.
